callGraph.callee:
bundle.Files
            .Where(f => f.IsXml || f.IsEncrypted)
            .Where(f => f.Kind is ControllerFileKind.Dir
                or ControllerFileKind.Filter
                or ControllerFileKind.Grid
                or ControllerFileKind.Lookup
                or ControllerFileKind.Report)
            .ToList
